subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs. Aid him, then, through the wondrous tokens of Thy triumph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی آمن بک و بایاتک ان انصره ببدایع نصرک ثم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
